Meanwhile, Matt Smith and Rohin Aojula investigate the incredible 'tail' of the tiger who came for much more than just tea in their village of Holmfirth, back in the 1940s. Exec Prods: Mark McMullen/Melanie Darlaston; Senior Prod/Dir: Adam Caldow; Prods/Dirs: Jacob Hesmondhalgh/Laura Blair; Daisybeck/Group M (S22 Ep4)

programme.title: Ellis
programme.desc: The village of Elmsly is shaken when student Abi Marshall is found crushed beneath fallen scaffolding at Quinn Artisan Stone - a construction firm and the area's economic powerhouse. Owner Elliot Quinn calls it a tragic accident, eager to shield his business from bad press, but Ellis isn't convinced. Ellis soon sees how deep the Quinns' influence runs, and the deeper she digs, the more hints of illicit activity begin to surface at the edges of the business. In Elmsly, loyalty and fear bind people as tightly as any law, and the few facts Ellis can prise free suggest Abi came dangerously close to exposing something. (Concludes tomorrow.) Writer: Oliver Frampton; Dir: Max Myers; Prod: Martin Mahon (S2 Ep3/4)
